question: Will the amount of money representing all central bank assets for the euro area have increased by 2026-04-19 as compared to its value on 2026-04-12?
resolution_criteria:
Resolves to the value found at https://fred.stlouisfed.org/series/ECBASSETSW once the data is published.

The exact value on 2026-04-12 is unknown, but the most recent known value (as of 2026-04-02) was 6162122.000. (The latest value released in Central Bank Assets for Euro Area (11-19 Countries) from the release Weekly Financial Statements of the Eurosystem.)
background:
The notes from the release: N/A.  The notes from the series: A longer history for this series is available on the monthly series ECBASSETS (https://fred.stlouisfed.org/series/ECBASSETS).

Copyright, 2016, European Central Bank (ECB). Reprinted with permission..  Additional background of the series:  1. the units of the series: Millions of Euros.  2. the seasonal adjustments of the series:  Not Seasonally Adjusted  3. the update frequency: Weekly
